tasks.subject: Task 1: Add focus-pause support to the typewriter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make `typeBlock` idle when the tab is hidden and resume from the exact character position when the tab returns.

**Files:**
- Modify: `engine.js` — `typeBlock` function (~line 909)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Typewriter stops advancing characters while `document.hidden` is true
- [ ] When tab returns, typing continues from the exact position it stopped
- [ ] `startTime` is adjusted on resume so speed appears continuous
- [ ] Behaviour is unchanged when tab never loses focus

**Verify:** Manual — open a story, switch tabs mid-sentence, return, confirm text continues smoothly.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine.js"], "verifyCommand": "manual", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Typewriter stops advancing while document.hidden", "Resumes from exact position on return", "startTime adjusted so speed is continuous", "No regression when tab keeps focus"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add focus-pause support to audio
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pause `currentAudio` when the tab is hidden and resume it from the same position when the tab returns.

**Files:**
- Modify: `engine.js` — audio section (~line 430)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] currentAudio pauses when tab goes hidden
- [ ] currentAudio resumes from paused position when tab returns
- [ ] No double-resume if audio ended while tab was hidden
- [ ] Act title splash audio is NOT paused

**Verify:** Manual — start audio narration, switch tabs ~3s, return, confirm audio resumes mid-sentence.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine.js"], "verifyCommand": "manual", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Audio pauses on tab hide", "Audio resumes from same position on tab return", "Act splash audio unaffected"]}
```
